user.title: Auto Off Setup
user.description: Configure the Auto Off integration. Groups can be added later using the set_group service.

set_group.name: Set Group
set_group.description: Create or update an auto-off group.

targets.name: Targets
targets.description: Entities to turn off when the delay elapses.

sensors.name: Sensors
sensors.description: Binary sensors whose OFF state starts the turn-off timer.

delay.name: Delay (minutes)
delay.description: Integer minutes or a Jinja template rendering to minutes.

group_name.name: Group Name
group_name.description: Name of the group to delete.
